column1: Hey Emma, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Yes we are on board just looking at flights!
Yea lets do it! how many ppl in your group?
perfect. SDSU right? y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, were you lookin to get things booked today?
hey Emma whats the best email to send the details to
hey gonna send this to emmabellomo489@gmail.com that cool?
just sent that over did it come through?
We are interested in the five night option with the Occidental two person room and the add-on party package
Okay dope yea I'll set up the reservation right now
Also quick question for the difference in hotels which one will have more spring break colleges staying? We're just wondering where we would get the best experience
Occidental Punta Cana for sure. I'll be there as well!
did you want to do the 4 night or 5 nigth?
perfect. Ill send it over in a few mins
How can we also add the party package
We are 100% ready to book as soon as we get that party package added just so we ensure we're able to go to all the events and have transportation
All the events have transportation yup. Also express entry, cover charge and open bar included
Gonna add this in for you now
hey that should be all set now btw!
hey Emma checkin in, were we able to hop on that res?
perfect lmk when youre all set with payment so we can get you processed quickly
Ok we just paid in full!
Where can we get in contact with the people to pick us up from the airport?
dope! yea just enter your flight info into your account and we'll set up your transportation!
hey hey, when you get the chance can you enter your flight info onto your accounts so we can schedule your transportation
Hi we are here should we look for someone in specific
You're looking for the go blue tours staff in blue shirts
